title: AI Proxy Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the multi-provider multi-protocol LLM proxy. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, and Responses API protocols with model routing, fallback, web search, and reasoning summarization.

providers.description: List of upstream API providers. Each provider defines an external LLM service with its endpoints and authentication.

name.description: Unique identifier for this provider. Used as reference in model configurations.

endpoints.description: Maps protocol names to endpoint URLs. At least one endpoint required.

^(openai|anthropic|responses)$.description: Endpoint URL for this protocol. Example: https://api.provider.com/v1/chat/completions

default.description: Default protocol for multi-protocol providers. Required when endpoints has more than one entry.

apiKey.description: Direct API key for authentication. Supports ${VAR_NAME} syntax for environment variable interpolation. At least one of apiKey or envApiKey is required.

envApiKey.description: Environment variable name containing the API key. Used when apiKey is not set directly.

models.description: Maps model aliases to their provider and model configuration. Keys are user-facing model names (aliases).

provider.description: Name of the provider to use. Must reference an existing provider from the providers list.

model.description: Actual model identifier on the upstream provider. Can reference another model alias for inheritance.

type.description: Output protocol: 'openai' for Chat Completions, 'anthropic' for Messages API, 'auto' for passthrough (use incoming protocol).

kimi_tool_call_transform.description: Enable Kimi K2.5 tool call transformation between OpenAI and Anthropic formats.

glm5_tool_call_transform.description: Enable GLM-5 XML tool call extraction from reasoning_content tags.

reasoning_split.description: Enable separate reasoning output in streaming responses (MiniMax M2.7).

fallback.description: Fallback configuration for requests to unknown models. Routes failed requests to an alternative provider.

enabled.description: Enable fallback routing for unknown models.

provider.description: Fallback provider name. Must reference an existing provider. Required when enabled=true.

model.description: Fallback model identifier. Supports {model} placeholder for the requested model name. Required when enabled=true.

kimi_tool_call_transform.description: Enable Kimi tool call transform for fallback.

glm5_tool_call_transform.description: Enable GLM-5 tool call transform for fallback.

summarizer.description: Reasoning summarization configuration. Uses a fast model to summarize the LLM's internal reasoning.

mode.description: Summarizer mode: 'http' uses API calls, 'local' uses llama.cpp for offline summarization.

provider.description: Provider name for HTTP mode summarization.

prompt.description: Custom summarization prompt. Empty uses default prompt.

max_context_tokens.description: Maximum conversation history token count. Older turns are truncated. 0 = no limit.

websearch.description: Web search service configuration for tool-enabled models.

provider.description: Web search provider: Exa (AI search), Brave, or DuckDuckGo.

brave_api_key.description: Brave Search API key. Supports ${VAR_NAME} syntax.

memoryLogs.description: In-memory request logging configuration for the Logs UI.

enabled.description: Enable in-memory request logging. Can be toggled at runtime via UI.

capacity.description: Maximum log entries to retain. Oldest discarded when limit reached.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema for this configuration.

$id.description: Unique identifier for this configuration instance.

SamplingParams.description: Sampling parameters to inject into requests. Allows enforcing consistent behavior or providing defaults.

override.description: Config value behavior: true = config always overrides client values, false = client values win when set. Default is true.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0-2). Higher = more random. 0 = deterministic.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling probability (0-1). Alternative to temperature.

top_k.description: Top-K sampling. Limits to K most likely tokens. Not supported by all providers.

presence_penalty.description: Presence penalty (-2 to 2). Penalizes tokens based on presence in text so far.

frequency_penalty.description: Frequency penalty (-2 to 2). Penalizes tokens based on frequency in text so far.

LocalSummarizerConfig.description: Local llama.cpp summarizer configuration for offline reasoning summarization.

model_path.description: Path to the GGUF model file for local inference.

context_size.description: Context window size for the model.

gpu_layers.description: Layers to offload to GPU. 0 = CPU-only.

max_summary_tokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate for summary.
